Est. — An institute of sacred learning

Where knowledge meets reverence. معهد رحمة الإسلامي

Ma'hdu Rahmat Islamiyy Portal is a full Arabic Islamic school — Qur'an, Hadith, Fiqh, and the classical sciences, taught with rigor, taught with care.

100%Islamic Curriculum

A Word from the Proprietor & Founder

Every student who enters carries an amanah.

We do not merely transmit information — we cultivate character alongside knowledge, so a student leaves not only literate in the sciences of dīn, but formed by them. This is the trust our teachers carry, and the standard by which we measure every term.

— Fadeelat Sheikh Ismail Raji Ashola, Proprietor & Founder

Vision & Mission

Grounded in tradition. Built for today.

Our Vision

To raise a generation fluent in the Arabic language and firmly rooted in Islamic knowledge, equipped to serve their communities with wisdom and integrity.

Our Mission

To deliver a structured, rigorous curriculum across eight class levels — from Tadrīj through Thanawī — combining Qur'anic sciences, Arabic language, and classical Islamic disciplines.

Our History

Founded on the belief that sacred knowledge and modern excellence are not in tension, Ma'hdu Rahmat has grown into a full institute serving students across every stage of Islamic education.

Academic Programs

Eight levels, one continuous path.

Every student progresses through a structured sequence — from foundational Tadrīj to the advanced Thanawī stage — mastering Qur'an, Arabic, and the classical Islamic sciences at each level.

تدريج Tadrīj
إعدادي أول Awwal I'dādī
إعدادي ثاني Thānī I'dādī
إعدادي ثالث Thālith I'dādī
إعدادي رابع Rābiʿ I'dādī
أول ثانوي Thanawī Awwal
ثاني ثانوي Thanawī Thānī
ثالث ثانوي Thanawī Thālith
القرآن الكريمQur'an
الحديثHadith
التفسيرTafsir
الفقهFiqh
التوحيدTawhid
التجويدTajweed
السيرةSeerah
النحوArabic Grammar
الصرفMorphology
اللغة العربيةArabic Language

Admissions

A clear path to enrollment.

Every admission begins and ends inside the Applicant Portal — no paperwork, no waiting in line.

01

Create an account

Register with your name, phone number, and email, then verify your email to continue.

02

Complete the application

Provide personal, guardian, and academic details. Save your progress and return anytime.

03

Pay the admission fee

Transfer the non-refundable admission fee and upload your payment receipt for verification.

04

Receive your matric number

Once approved, your permanent matric number and portal login are sent to your email.

Start Your Application Ask a Question
